_rationale: The direct CLI happy path is now parity-ready again. The remaining drift on `git-analyze --json --scope wip` is runtime metadata only: `metadata.analysis_time_ms`, `metadata.analyzed_at`, and the low-signal `summary.risk_score` formatting. The descriptor now compares the stable summary counts/recommendation plus the stable metadata refs/scope on the real `lci-go-repo` corpus.
